title: Signature collection drive for pension withdrawal plan can begin
summary_full: The Central Election Commission (CVK) has decided to register the submitted draft law "Amendments to the State Funded Pensions Law", which means that the supporters of the initiative will be able to begin collecting signatures to possibly initiate a referendum on how Latvia's pension system works.
